headlines.title: US Fires at Iran After 3 US Service Members Killed in Middle East
headlines.description: The United States is firing back against Iran after the deaths of at least three U.S. service members in the Middle East. The American death toll in the war now stands at 17. NBC’s Keir Simmons reports for TODAY.

headlines.title: Judge puts temporary pause on Paramount-Warner merger
headlines.description: Paramount Skydance’s takeover of Warner Bros. Discovery hit a roadblock Monday after a federal judge temporarily paused the proposed merger.

headlines.title: Tate brothers in Miami court after new U.K. charges
headlines.description: Andrew and Tristan Tate appeared in a Miami courtroom after British prosecutors unveiled a wave of new charges, including rape. Authorities from the U.K. are seeking to extradite the Tate brothers. NBC News' Danny Cevallos reports on the 38 charges they face.

headlines.title: FDA says it’s still investigating Taylor Farms in cyclosporiasis outbreak
headlines.description: Taylor Farms continues to be the subject of a Food and Drug Administration investigation into the growing cyclosporiasis outbreak, despite a false positive test result, the agency said Monday.

headlines.title: Ferran Torres anota el gol que vale un Mundial para España
headlines.description: Con un hombre más en el campo, el futbolista del FC Barcelona apareció dentro del área y sacó un disparo imparable para el "Dibu" Martínez.

headlines.title: A look at the most exciting moments from the 2026 FIFA World Cup
headlines.description: A photo gallery of highlights from World Cup 2026.
headlines.source: NBC News Digital Art and Photo Department

headlines.title: The soccer fans who fell in love with America during the World Cup
headlines.description: The 2026 World Cup was an undeniable sensation in the United States, setting records for television ratings while millions of fans piled into stadiums to take in all the action.

headlines.title: Andy Burnham formally appointed U.K. prime minster
headlines.description: Andy Burnham was formally appointed the newest British prime minster, the seventh to take up the position in the last decade. NBC News’ Raf Sanchez reports on how Burnham differs from outgoing prime minster Keir Starmer and his meeting with King Charles III.

headlines.title: Calls for justice intensify at Nolan Wells’ funeral
headlines.description: OCEAN SPRINGS, Miss. — Nolan Wells, the Mississippi teenager whose death after a Fourth of July boating trip with friends has spurred national attention, was remembered Monday as a “gentle, calming spirit” during a funeral that attracted hundreds.

headlines.title: We want to hear how Medicaid work requirements are affecting you
headlines.description: NBC News is looking to speak with patients, medical providers and healthcare advocates about the changes they are experiencing due to a new Medicaid work mandate.

headlines.title: Sen. Darline Graham says she is running for a full 6-year term after Trump urged her to jump into the race
FDA says it’s still investigating Taylor Farms in cyclosporiasis outbreak
headlines.description: Taylor Farms continues to be the subject of a Food and Drug Administration investigation into the growing cyclosporiasis outbreak, despite a false positive test result, the agency said Monday.
